settings.heading: Shipping Policy
settings.intro: At ELARÉ, we believe your glow should never have to wait. That's why we aim to deliver your skincare essentials with care, speed, and transparency.

settings.title: Where We Ship
settings.body:
We currently deliver all across Pakistan.

International delivery is coming soon — stay tuned!

settings.title: Processing Time
settings.body:
All orders are processed within 1–2 business days (Monday to Saturday).

You'll receive a confirmation email or WhatsApp message once your order is on its way.

settings.title: Estimated Delivery Time
settings.body:
• Major Cities: 2–4 working days
  • Other Areas: 3–7 working days

Please note: Unforeseen delays (weather, public holidays, or courier load) may affect delivery timelines, but we'll always keep you informed.

settings.title: Shipping Charges
settings.body:
• Free delivery on skincare bundles
  • Flat rate for individual products — calculated and shown at checkout

settings.title: Order Tracking
settings.body:
Once shipped, you'll receive a tracking link via SMS or email.

You can also track your order anytime using the "Order Tracking" option in the menu on our website.
Need help? Just WhatsApp us — we're happy to assist you.
settings.footer_note: Your glow matters. Every package is sent with care, dua, and dedication — delivered from our care to your confidence.
